content:
Here’s what I found on **Max Eidswick**:

---

### 🧵 Online Presence & Community Role

Max Eidswick has an active presence in online health support forums, particularly around ALS. On one forum, he’s listed as a **“Legendary member”** with **5,598 posts**, identified as residing in **Pinehurst, Texas** (US), with involvement spanning years citeturn0search0turn0search1. This suggests he contributed frequently—likely offering insight, support, or shared experiences to that community.

---

### 🕊️ Death Notice

A later forum thread shares that **Max has passed away**, with a memorial thread created in response. One user, “patrick123,” noted seeing on Facebook that “Max has passed away.” If this refers to the same Max Eidswick, it indicates he is deceased citeturn0search2.

---

### 🟨 Clarification

There’s no public profile linking this Max Eidswick to software development in Munich or Persoft.
